config.title: Definicja schematu eksportu danych #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
#include "L50222" #include "l50101"
dim g_pModule : set g_pModule = nothing dim g_arrRecords : set g_arrRecords = nothing dim g_nCurrRecord : g_nCurrRecord = 0
function fopen() : fopen = true #ifdef _ABAKUS if HARUI_FREE(UAR_OGRANICZONY_DOSTEP_DANE_KLIENTA) then fopen = false exit function end if #endif
if not std_fopen() then fopen = false exit function end if
set g_pModule = doc_.getmodule(60272) set g_arrRecords = doc_.afc.new_navoarray()
dim idGlobFile : idGlobFile = trans_.findobjid(TYPEID_N5GLOBFILE,"nIndeks=GLOB_FILE_EXPORT_FILTER_DEFINITION")
if idGlobFile > 0 then if not page_.root is nothing then if page_.root.isnew() then page_.root.ignore=true end if end if set page_.root = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5GLOBFILE,idGlobFile) end if
if not page_.root.fPlik.isempty() then g_pModule.load_data g_arrRecords, page_.root.fPlik end if
auto_add end function
function fclose set g_pModule = nothing set g_arrRecords = nothing end function
function auto_add() if g_nCurrRecord < 0 then g_nCurrRecord = 0 end if if g_nCurrRecord > g_arrRecords.UpperIndex() then g_arrRecords.Add g_pModule.new_exp_filter() page_.enableedit = true end if end function
function fnew() g_arrRecords.Insert g_nCurrRecord,g_pModule.new_exp_filter() page_.enableedit = true end function
function fdelete g_arrRecords.Remove g_nCurrRecord fsave auto_add end function
function ffirst() g_nCurrRecord = 0 auto_add end function
function fprev() if g_nCurrRecord > 0 then g_nCurrRecord = g_nCurrRecord - 1 end if auto_add end function
function fnext() if g_nCurrRecord < g_arrRecords.UpperIndex() then g_nCurrRecord = g_nCurrRecord + 1 end if auto_add end function
function flast() g_nCurrRecord = g_arrRecords.UpperIndex() auto_add end function
function fsave dim pStream : set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() if not g_pModule.save_data(g_arrRecords, pStream) then fsave = false page_.ctrl(CTRLID_DEF_NAME).valid = false exit function end if
page_.root.nIndeks = clng(GLOB_FILE_EXPORT_FILTER_DEFINITION) page_.root.fPlik.Attach pStream page_.root.fPlik.ext = "xml" fsave = std_fsave() end function
function fenableedit page_.enableedit = not page_.enableedit end function
function fback 'to_do: check save and save if wants page_.goback end function
function c##CTRLID_DEF_NAME##_ondataentered(pCtrl,newValue) c##CTRLID_DEF_NAME##_ondataentered = true g_arrRecords.Value(g_nCurrRecord).nazwa = newValue end function
function c##CTRLID_DEF_NAME##_ongetdata(pCtrl) pCtrl.value = g_arrRecords.Value(g_nCurrRecord).nazwa end function
function c##CTRLID_VBCODE##_ondataentered(pCtrl,newValue) c##CTRLID_VBCODE##_ondataentered = true g_arrRecords.Value(g_nCurrRecord).vbcode = newValue end function
function c##CTRLID_VBCODE##_ongetdata(pCtrl) pCtrl.value = g_arrRecords.Value(g_nCurrRecord).vbcode end function

page.body:
QXF_BEGIN QXS_BEGIN_FLAT(SECID_INFO,Informacje,FORM_SPAN)
QXE_LABEL_REQ(Nazwa ) QXE_EDIT_CUSTOM(CTRLID_DEF_NAME,100,1)
QXS_END_FLAT(FORM_SPAN) QXR_SEPARATOR(FORM_SPAN)
QXS_BEGIN_REQ(SECID_CODE,Kod definicji,FORM_SPAN)
QXC_MULTILINE_CUSTOM(CTRLID_VBCODE,max,7000,2)
QXS_END_REQ(FORM_SPAN) QXF_END
